summary: Draft candidate package for LidReliabilityState under HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Power. The clean Win25H2Clean baseline confirmed the current default, the repo power notes carry an exact docs hit, the shared string batch found an exact current-build ntoskrnl.exe hit, the shared Ghidra batch produced reviewable xref artifacts, and the guest-processed stepwise Procmon boot log on RegProbe-Baseline-Clean-20260329 captured an exact runtime read for LidReliabilityState. App surfacing remains a separate product decision from evidence classification.

validation_proof.exact_quote_or_path: Docs/power/power.md:170 shows `LidReliabilityState` with observed literal `1` in the repo power notes.
validation_proof.notes: The docs-first triage and phase-0 baseline agree on the current Win25H2Clean baseline value for LidReliabilityState. App surfacing is tracked separately from evidence classification.

setting.name: Lid Reliability State
setting.casual_explanation: Lid Reliability State is a low-level power-manager registry value under the main Power key.
setting.why_people_change_it: Researchers track this value when reviewing lid-switch reliability logic and sleep policy inputs on mobile systems.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: Cross-layer evidence now converges for this raw power-manager value: docs, current-build static hits, Ghidra review, and an exact runtime read are all attached.
setting.professional_notes: Win25H2Clean phase-0 existence confirmed LidReliabilityState on the live baseline with preview value 1. The docs-first triage then tied the value to exact repo documentation hits, led by Docs/power/power.md:170. A shared current-build string batch found an exact hit in C:\Windows\System32\ntoskrnl.exe, and the shared Ghidra batch on the same binary preserved a reviewable xref/decompile artifact set for the docs-first power-control family. A guest-processed stepwise Procmon boot log was then rerun from RegProbe-Baseline-Clean-20260329. It completed shell-safe, processed the trace inside the guest, and copied only the summary and filtered hit CSV back to the host. That lane captured an exact runtime read for LidReliabilityState via RegQueryValue from System.

allowed_values.label: Observed Win25H2Clean baseline
allowed_values.meaning: The current clean VM baseline exposes LidReliabilityState=1.

targets.notes: This candidate is tracked as a raw kernel-facing value, not as a published end-user tweak profile.

app_current_implementation.provider_source: not currently shipped in the app
app_current_implementation.notes: The current app does not expose LidReliabilityState as a direct tweak or supported UI surface.

windows_defaults.label: Observed Win25H2Clean baseline

states.rationale: Keep the currently observed baseline value (1) while this raw control stays in research packaging only.

windows_defaults.notes: Observed directly from the 96-key phase-0 existence batch on Win25H2Clean.

recommended_profiles.label: Observed baseline

states.rationale: Track the observed baseline value without turning it into a shipped preset.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You want the repo to track the live baseline and current evidence for this raw power-manager value.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You want a supported end-user tweak or a documented Microsoft control surface.
tradeoffs: Keeps the candidate research-only and non-actionable.

evidence.title: Repo power notes for docs-first power-control values
evidence.summary: Repo power notes contain an exact entry for LidReliabilityState, led by Docs/power/power.md:170.

evidence.title: Win25H2Clean 96-key phase-0 existence batch
evidence.summary: The 96-key existence batch confirmed LidReliabilityState exists on the clean baseline with observed value 1.

evidence.title: Shared docs-first string triage for current-build ntoskrnl
evidence.summary: Shared string triage found an exact current-build ntoskrnl.exe string hit for LidReliabilityState.

evidence.title: Shared Ghidra xref batch for docs-first power-control values
evidence.summary: The shared ntoskrnl Ghidra batch produced a reviewable string/xref artifact set for LidReliabilityState; some values resolved naturally while several remained forced-boundary fallback blocks.

evidence.title: Shared clean-baseline guest-processed stepwise Procmon boot log for docs-first power-control values
evidence.summary: The guest-processed stepwise Procmon boot log captured an exact runtime read for LidReliabilityState on RegProbe-Baseline-Clean-20260329. Processes: System.

decision.why: LidReliabilityState now has converged cross-layer evidence on RegProbe-Baseline-Clean-20260329: phase-0 baseline existence, exact repo-doc hits, current-build ntoskrnl string corroboration, reviewable Ghidra artifacts, and an exact runtime read from System captured by the guest-processed stepwise Procmon boot log. App mapping is tracked separately and does not block evidence classification.
